paywall.headline: Welcome back
paywall.subheadline: Your menstrual phase plan is waiting.
benefits: Know why some weeks hit harder
Mochi's there for the hard hours
Your data stays on your device

menstrual: Rest and nourish. Shorter fasts are ideal right now.
Your body needs extra care during menstruation. Be gentle.
Iron-rich foods are extra important during your period.
follicular: Rising estrogen = rising energy. Great time for longer fasts!
Your body is primed for a challenge. Push yourself!
Follicular phase is a great time to build your fasting routine.
ovulation: Peak energy! Moderate fasting keeps you balanced.
You're at your strongest, a great time to try new recipes.
Ovulation means peak performance. Enjoy the energy!
luteal: Be gentle. Your body needs more fuel before your period.
Progesterone is rising, shorter fasts prevent burnout.
Cravings are normal in the luteal phase. Listen to your body.
